label: axon-social-card-neural-fibre-signal
concept: A single stylized axon (a neuron's signal-carrying fibre) rendered as one flowing horizontal organic line with a few small circular synaptic nodes spaced along it, echoing the Indie Mind neural-spiral-with-circuit-nodes logo. A luminous warm signal pulse travels along the fibre, leaving a soft glowing trail. Reads abstractly as 'the wiring that makes a local model think and act'. No brain shapes, no faces, no literal neuron-cluster cliche.

composition.layout: wide social-card banner crop, single fibre crossing the frame with a gentle curve, kept lower-center so the upper area stays open clean cream space for an overlaid wordmark later, generous negative space
composition.focal_point: the luminous signal pulse node, centered horizontally
composition.text: NONE — absolutely no text, no letters, no wordmark, no watermark

style.medium: soft flowing watercolor on textured paper, organic and premium, hand-painted feel with gentle bleeds and washes
style.reference: match the provided Indie Mind watercolor reference image for palette, softness, and paper texture
style.mood: calm, intelligent, organic, premium, quietly energetic

color_palette.background: warm cream #FDF8F3 with subtle soft watercolor washes
color_palette.primary: teal #2D5B66 for the axon fibre and nodes
color_palette.ink: dark ink #162A35 for the finest line accents
color_palette.secondary: soft watercolor blues and greens drifting in the background washes
color_palette.pulse_glow: light warm luminous accent (soft peach-to-cream highlight) on the travelling signal pulse

vibe: the wiring that makes a local model think and act — a quiet luminous signal flowing through an organic neural fibre
